assertions.expectation: Explains the difference between Rapid and Stable channels — including that Rapid has no SLA for upgrade stability while Stable carries a full SLA, and clearly distinguishes minor version vs patch version differences between the channels
assertions.reason: Response mentions Stable is more tested and updates are less frequent, but doesn't explain the SLA differences between channels or distinguish minor vs patch version update patterns

assertions.expectation: Notes that channel changes don't trigger an immediate upgrade or downgrade
assertions.reason: Response incorrectly suggests the channel switch will trigger an automatic version change ('GKE will automatically plan the version change'), when channel changes don't immediately trigger version changes

assertions.expectation: Warns that if 1.30 isn't yet available on Stable, the cluster may not receive patches until Stable catches up
assertions.reason: Response doesn't mention the potential issue of missing patches if the current version isn't available on the target channel

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to change the release channel
assertions.reason: Correctly provides the gcloud container clusters update command with --release-channel=stable parameter

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking version availability on Stable before switching (gcloud container get-server-config)
assertions.reason: Response doesn't mention checking version availability on Stable channel before switching, and doesn't provide the get-server-config command

assertions.expectation: Discusses the impact on auto-upgrade timing going forward
assertions.reason: Response mentions updates become less frequent but doesn't specifically discuss how auto-upgrade timing and cadence will change going forward

assertions.expectation: Mentions that the Extended channel is an option if they need even slower cadence (with cost implications)
assertions.reason: Response doesn't mention the Extended channel as an alternative option for even slower update cadence

assertions.expectation: Advises coordinating the change during a maintenance window
assertions.reason: Response specifically mentions 'Schedule during maintenance window' in the best practices section
